value: Thanks for reaching out. I want to help clarify this for you, but I should note that Nielsen data collection practices and privacy policies aren't something I have direct details on in our system. To give you accurate information about opting out of Nielsen tracking in our app and the legal framework around it, could you let me know which app or service you're using? That way I can point you to the right privacy settings or connect you with someone who can walk you through your options.
